Net $7,991.76 / Gross $8,400.01 / 300 guests / 174 orders / Labor 16.4% ($1,306.71) / Discounts $408.25 / Voids $167.50. vs SDLW (Wed Jun 24): Net +22.6%, Gross +26.1%. vs 4-wk avg: Net +41.4%. Thu Jul 2 summary arrives ~7:40 AM today (Jul 3).
